summary: In a rare audio recording following World War I, Thomas Edison delivers a message of remembrance. While expressing deep pride in the courage and character of American soldiers, he strongly urges the nation to honor the immense sacrifices of its European allies, emphasizing that victory would have been impossible without them.

principles.statement: We must always remember and honor the crucial role our allies played in our shared victories.
principles.rationale: Despite pride in our own national achievements, victory would have been impossible without the fierce and overwhelming sacrifices made by allied nations.
principles.source_quote: let us remember always that the war could not have been won if the belgians the British the French and the Italians had not fought like Bulldogs in the face of overwhelming odds

principles.statement: The cultural symbols of our allies should be embraced and remembered as closely as our own.
principles.rationale: To properly revere the memory of our own fallen soldiers, we must equally honor the brothers in arms who fought alongside them.
principles.source_quote: I believe that the national layers of France Great Britain Italy and Belgium should for all time to come be as familiar to us as our own star spangle better

signature_quotes.text: the word American has a new meaning in Europe our soldiers have made it mean courage generosity self-restraint and modesty
signature_quotes.context: Describing the reputation American soldiers built in Europe during WWI.

signature_quotes.text: let us remember always that the war could not have been won if the belgians the British the French and the Italians had not fought like Bulldogs in the face of overwhelming odds
signature_quotes.context: Urging Americans to remember the indispensable sacrifices of their WWI allies.

signature_quotes.text: I hope that when we do reverence to the memory of our brave boys who fell in France we shall not forget that their brothers in arms who wore the uniform of our allies
signature_quotes.context: On honoring the shared sacrifice of all allied troops.

anti_patterns.description: Permitting detractors to belittle the contributions and sacrifices of allies.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It ignores the reality of the casualty lists and the fact that victory would have been impossible without their fierce resistance against overwhelming odds.
